# SpaceClub!

> SpaceClub! is a free, open-source static website template built with Eleventy (11ty), Bootstrap, and Pagefind. It is fully ownable, easily editable, and deployable anywhere for free.

SpaceClub! is designed for clubs, community groups, and organisations that want a complete web presence without vendor lock-in. Content is written in Markdown and managed through plain files — no CMS login required.

## Pages

/ - Home page with latest posts and upcoming events
/about/ - About the organisation
/contact/ - Contact form (Netlify Forms)
/posts/ - All blog posts
/events/ - All events (upcoming and past)

## Content types

Posts - Blog articles and updates. Each post has a title, date, author, description, and optional image and photo gallery.

Events - Scheduled events with date, time, location, and optional gallery. Events are automatically classified as upcoming or past based on the current date and time.

## Technology

Built with: Eleventy (11ty) v3, Nunjucks templates, Bootstrap 5, Bootstrap Icons, Pagefind full-text search, Day.js for date handling.

Deployment: Works with Netlify, GitHub Pages, Vercel, or any static host.

Source: https://github.com/TalkingSites/spaceclub-template
Documentation: https://spaceclubwiki.talkingsites.org
